era_resolution: Quarantine and isolation were implemented, but the understanding of the disease was limited, leading to significant mortality rates
modern_resolution: Implementation of advanced contact tracing, vaccine development, and global coordination to mitigate the spread of the disease, utilizing AI-driven predictive analytics and genomic sequencing

biblical_tie.context: For nation shall rise against nation, and kingdom against kingdom: and there shall be famines, and pestilences, and earthquakes, in divers places.

protocol: UESP Protocol Alpha-12: Activate global health monitoring, initiate AI-assisted vaccine research, and establish an international task force to coordinate mitigation efforts
